N's life was finally looking up. He was happy with his girlfriend, Uzi, and learning to draw manga. Khan finally accepted him as a son-in-law.

He was doing well in school too. N just moved into a new apartment within the bunker with Uzi, but he could not shake off the feeling of being watched no matter where he went. Noticing small items and things being slightly out of place like someone touched them. Uzi always dismissed this, claiming he was just paranoid after what happened to Cyn. It eased his mind hearing Uzi say it.

One day his class ended early but Uzi had to stay and talk with the teacher because of her behavior in class. The usual thing really. N normally waited for Uzi, but it was their first month anniversary. He needed to get ready!

With help from Uzi's mother, Nori (in her core form, which was a bio-mechanical heart crab cuz Nori's body was destroyed), he made a plushie that somewhat resembled himself. So when he wasn't there for Uzi, she would have him as a plushie! Perfect gift! It was wrapped with a bow.

8PM; Bunker; N and Uzi's Apartment

---

N put on some of Uzi's favorite nightcore songs for ambiance as he prepared dinner(batteries and oil canisters).

"Man, Uzi is gonna love this!" His tail started waging unintentionally. "I can't believe it has been a month...I hope she likes the plushie." He held onto it and hugged it before placing it down on the romantic table.

He was slightly worried, it's been a few hours and she wasn't home... Did something happen?- No... She would have called or something. Maybe she was also preparing something for him?- knock knock. Someone was at the door?

N walked over to the door, placed his hand on the keypad, and opened the door. On the door's step was a large gift box, nametag "My Beloved N".

N looked around but no one was there, the bunker hallway was empty. He took the box it, it was quite heavy for a gift. "Oh biscuits Uzi, what are you planning this time?" He smiled widely. Ripping the paper and opening it.

His mechanical heart skipped a beat. He stared in horror at the contents of the box.

It was Uzi's head. "FATAL ERROR" flickering constantly on its display. He dropped the lid of the box, taking shaky steps backward. "U-uzi...?- T-this isn't funny..." The smile on his face faltered. This is a cruel prank. Right? It has to be... She cut off her own head to spook him. They both can regenerate it was not a big deal. N himself got decapitated many times but this is....It made him sick.

He looked around, trying
